activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization - extra EU countries in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'AB Akronmaskiner AB' in certificate found explicitly in invoice text as 'AB Akronmaskiner' after normalization and removal of generic 'AB'. Address and country 'Sverige/Sweden' matches perfectly (rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.5). Land matches exactly per 4.1.4. Result is MATCH.

consignee.motivation: Consignee name differs only by 'Ltd' in invoice vs certificate which is accepted under commercial abbreviation rules (4.2.2.1.2). Delivery address and country 'Ukraine' match exactly (4.2.3). Result is MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Fan AKL125glv J140L12FM 22kW4p4/6 26101 1,00 pcs ... Fan AKL125glv J140L06FM 15kW4p4/6 26101 1,00 pcs
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description 'Fans AKL' with an explicit invoice reference 'Invoice 175585' and matching invoice date, fulfilling conditions in 4.3.5 for general goods description with invoice reference. No article numbers in certificate to verify under 4.3.2. Result is MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity '2 pcs' matches sum of two invoice lines with each 1,00 pcs, allowed by exception 3D for summing multiple rows within same invoice (4.4.5.5). Units match exactly. Result is MATCH.

origin.motivation: Certificate states origin as 'European Community' and 'Sweden'. Invoice declares 'SE preferential origin'. Sweden is an EU member, so EU normalization rules (4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2) apply. Per 4.6 China/Hongkong equivalence rule not applicable here. Origin is clearly confirmed in invoice. Result is MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla tillämpliga kontrollpunkter kan verifieras med hög säkerhet och tillåten normalisering utan tveksamheter eller motsägelser. Certifikatets consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan entydigt identifieras i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
